message:
feat(freeze): Add define_method_computed opcode Zig support

Convert define_method_computed opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode defines a method with a computed property name.

Stack effect: [obj, prop_key, func] -> [obj] (pops key and func)

Implementation:
- Pops func and key from stack
- Reads obj from stack (doesn't pop)
- Converts key JSValue to atom
- Frees key after conversion
- Returns exception if atom conversion fails
- Defines property with configurable/writable flags
- Frees atom and func references
- Returns exception if DefineProperty fails
- In Zig: returns qjs.JS_EXCEPTION directly on error
- In C: uses next_block = -1 and break
